name: Pasta with Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup broth or liquid from canned tomatoes
2 cups (1 can) cannellini (white kidney beans), rinsed and drained
8 ounces elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté garlic, onion, carrot, parsley, basil, and oregano in olive oil until onions are tender.
2. Add tomatoes, broth, salt, and pepper. Cover and stir frequently, simmering for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. Add beans and cover, simmering about 20 minutes to blend seasonings.
4. Cook macaroni, drain, and toss with butter and Parmesan cheese.
5. Add the cooked macaroni to the vegetable mixture.
6. Serve immediately with additional Parmesan cheese, if desired.
